texto: When I die, nieces, I want to be cremated, my ashes taken up in a bush plane and sprinkled onto the people in town below. Let them think my body is snowflakes, sticking in their hair and on their shoulders like dandruff.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joseph Boyden: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “When I die, nieces, I want to be cremated, my ashes taken up in a bush plane and sprinkled onto t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, death, snow pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e snow.

frase_original: When I die, nieces, I want to be cremated, my ashes taken up in a bush plane and sprinkled onto the people in town below. Let them think my body is snowflakes, sticking in their hair and on their shoulders like dandruff.

texto: Your grandfather was a hero in a war, girls. He wasn't a bad man or a weak man. Maybe he was too old to have a second family, a second wife and your mother and me, so many years after he lost his first. Maybe he was too old to fight anymore, and that's why he let me be taken away. I've thought about this for years and years. All I know is there are no heroes in this world. Not really. Just men and women who become old and tired and lose the strength to fight for what they love any longer.
explicacao: Citação de Joseph Boyden sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Your grandfather was a hero in a war, girls. He wasn't a bad man or a weak man. Maybe he was too …” articula familia, heroes, old em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como old.

frase_original: Your grandfather was a hero in a war, girls. He wasn't a bad man or a weak man. Maybe he was too old to have a second family, a second wife and your mother and me, so many years after he lost his first. Maybe he was too old to fight anymore, and that's why he let me be taken away. I've thought about this for years and years. All I know is there are no heroes in this world. Not really. Just men and women who become old and tired and lose the strength to fight for what they love any longer.
